creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #5)
> I feel like I am missing vital information.
> 
> I have to assume the stage support is added just to stop the port from being
> pruned, but what's the point if the port doesn't work anyway?
> 
> What's so important about this particular port?

Nothing particular, just updating the old versions. At least, it will be staged while I'm working to get it fixed.
